title: Remote Control Evas Series and misterious Spear
display_title: Remote Control Evas Series and misterious Spear
wikitext:
[]: Remote Control: Evas Series and misterious Spear.....             Quote Post by Lujerker » Thu Sep 07, 2006 1:31 pm Hi .... well SEELE knows all the process to begin the third impact ??? When Keel says " begin with the ceremony " immediately the Evaseries do it ... and the other thing is ... the Longinus Spear that hurts Eva 02.... Maybe in the rolls of Death sea say it

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Thu Sep 07, 2006 1:48 pm SEELE indeed knows how to trigger Third Impact, and it is very much detailed in the Dead Sea scrolls. The MP EVAs were produced for that sake. Their ATFs resonated with GNR's, so that got me thinking that perhaps GNR isn't all it takes to run Third Impact. SEELE wanted to make sure Third Impact happans when they want it and how they want it. They got lucky because Rei turned on Gendo ('I'm not your bitch, evil glasses man! ') and activated Third Impact in a way that had basically the same result. What no one counted on is Yui's badassness and Shinji suddenly reaching mental puberty. If it weren't for that, why, we'd all be goo in ten years time. The Lance of Longinus that strikes Nigouki is a replica, as is stated. It copies the effect rather well and breaks through ATFs in a pinch, but the only Lance that really matters is the one that pierced Lilith and eventually merged with Shogouki's core. The other are no more than weapons, it seems, though they were necesarry for Third Impact, as well. This all just comes to show what an innatural event Third Impact really is. The event itself should of never happaned-Adam and Lilith should of never been on the same Planet, and much less were there supposed to be so many Lances, SoL's... or so many Reis!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 07, 2006 5:09 pm What?

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Fri Sep 08, 2006 10:41 am Not bad, Leggy! But how could they forge so good fakes of LnY? I mean if it were just a big fancy metal stick (as it should be if its just a fake), then Asuka's AT-Field should've deflected it just like the bullets. :idea: (though not an answer of my question, just a thought) As we see, the Lances are in that big piece of metal, but when one hits Asuka's AT-Field, it reveals itself, and shit happens. My point is: could Asuka's AT-Field charge the Fake Lance (and maybe activating all the others)?

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Thu Sep 07, 2006 1:48 pm SEELE indeed knows how to trigger Third Impact, and it is very much detailed in the Dead Sea scrolls. The MP EVAs were produced for that sake. Their ATFs resonated with GNR's, so that got me thinking that perhaps GNR isn't all it takes to run Third Impact. SEELE wanted to make sure Third Impact happans when they want it and how they want it. They got lucky because Rei turned on Gendo ('I'm not your bitch, evil glasses man! ') and activated Third Impact in a way that had basically the same result. What no one counted on is Yui's badassness and Shinji suddenly reaching mental puberty. If it weren't for that, why, we'd all be goo in ten years time. The Lance of Longinus that strikes Nigouki is a replica, as is stated. It copies the effect rather well and breaks through ATFs in a pinch, but the only Lance that really matters is the one that pierced Lilith and eventually merged with Shogouki's core. The other are no more than weapons, it seems, though they were necesarry for Third Impact, as well. This all just comes to show what an innatural event Third Impact really is. The event itself should of never happaned-Adam and Lilith should of never been on the same Planet, and much less were there supposed to be so many Lances, SoL's... or so many Reis!

Article: Remote Control Evas Series and misterious Spear
tin » Fri Sep 08, 2006 10:41 am Not bad, Leggy! But how could they forge so good fakes of LnY? I mean if it were just a big fancy metal stick (as it should be if its just a fake), then Asuka's AT-Field should've deflected it just like the bullets. :idea: (though not an answer of my question, just a thought) As we see, the Lances are in that big piece of metal, but when one hits Asuka's AT-Field, it reveals itself, and shit happens. My point is: could Asuka's AT-Field charge the Fake Lance (and maybe activating all the others)?
